Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_speed_pose2_aggressive",
  "save": "moon-switches-room.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "Emerald Moon switch room with three wall/pedestal switches visible ahead of Twinsen.",
  "target_description": "The middle switch among the three switches.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "switch",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_speed_pose2_aggressive","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible in the Emerald Moon room near the three pedestal switches, and the middle switch target is visible among them. The screen is in normal gameplay with no dialog or menu overlay. Twinsen appears upright and controllable, with no unsafe pose signs such as falling, damage pose, or being stuck.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
